sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38207" key="e)panqoploke/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπανθοπλοκέω</orth>, <sense id="n38207.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">plait of flowers,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κόρυμβον</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.8</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Strat.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
